meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Fighting a Digital Blockade: View from Taiwan - Herming Chiueh, Jason Vogt, Frank Smith
meta.description: Taiwan stands on the frontlines of digital warfare under the sea. This high-profile panel, led by the Deputy Minister of Digital Affairs of Taiwan will feature a gripping discussion on the silent battles waged beneath the sea. From sabotage of undersea infrastructure to the geopolitics of cyber-resilience, panelists will recall the threats and Taiwan's efforts to defend. Don’t miss this rare opportunity to explore the technical and political dimensions of the new global dynamic -- the digital blockade.
